programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Dallas couple hunts for a beach retreat that's large enough to share with their family and friends in Cape San Blas, Fla.; they find a bargain bungalow close to the water; but it comes with the price of needing a lot of work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: California Couple Seeks Cozy Retreat on Puget Sound
programme.desc: A couple from Long Beach dreams of a retreat on Washington state's Puget Sound, where rocky shores, pine trees and hiking replace California beaches. With young kids growing up fast, they hope to reconnect with family and nature by restoring a hidden gem.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Boho on the Beach in Texas
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beachside property in Surfside, Texas, to be their weekend getaway and a source of rental income, hoping to find a boho design to set their house apart.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: The Italian Job in Wildwood, NJ
programme.desc: A trio of weekend warriors pool their resources to buy a beach house that they can renovate for their big Italian family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: California Couple Seeks Cozy Retreat on Puget Sound
programme.desc: A couple from Long Beach dreams of a retreat on Washington state's Puget Sound, where rocky shores, pine trees and hiking replace California beaches. With young kids growing up fast, they hope to reconnect with family and nature by restoring a hidden gem.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Boho on the Beach in Texas
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beachside property in Surfside, Texas, to be their weekend getaway and a source of rental income, hoping to find a boho design to set their house apart.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: The Italian Job in Wildwood, NJ
programme.desc: A trio of weekend warriors pool their resources to buy a beach house that they can renovate for their big Italian family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Dallas couple hunts for a beach retreat that's large enough to share with their family and friends in Cape San Blas, Fla.; they find a bargain bungalow close to the water; but it comes with the price of needing a lot of work.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The guys revive a 19th century cabin taken down in Ripley, W.Va; for a break, they to the state fair; they go to the Barnwood Living backlot, where they're challenged to make a 30-foot timber frame enclosure using only spare parts.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The guys travel to West Alexander, Pa., the heart of farm country, to save a classic bank barn; Johnny visits a local farmer and her pasture-raised animals; Mark drops by a local farmers' market to buy goodies for the crew.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The guys build a log cabin pool house on a tight job site in Mentor-on-the-Lake, Ohio, extending the size of the cabin and incorporate a partition wall; Johnny and Sherman hunt for sea glass; Mark Bowe gets a lesson in chainsaw carving.

programme.title: Restoration Road With Clint Harp
programme.desc: A dairy barn from upstate New York is turned into a custom home in Texas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Restoration Road With Clint Harp
programme.desc: A pre-Revolutionary War stone inn is rebuilt into a beautiful Texas home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Restoration Road With Clint Harp
programme.desc: A corn crib from the 1800s slated for the wrecking ball is saved and rebuilt as a charming and rustic timber-framed house just outside of Hamilton, Ohio.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.sub-title: A Natural Pool Oasis for All Seasons
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex carve out a luxury natural swimming pool with a handmade boulder wall, eco-filtration and native landscaping to create an all-season oasis and the ultimate gathering spot for friends, family and guests.

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.desc: When a family asks Cappie and Alex to give new life to their 70-year-old grain bin, they transform the cherished heirloom from retired to inspired by creating a backyard retreat complete with a luxurious interior and a custom-built BBQ.

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.desc: Years after their client's DIY raft sinks, Cappie and Alex reprise the dream with a custom floating retreat for the whole family, complete with shade, seating, a fishing nook and a fire pit for summer fun on the lake.

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex cleverly convert a retired ski gondola into a backyard hangout, complete with a unique sunburst deck and a combination fire-and-water feature for longtime friends.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordrays' new home gets a kid-friendly playroom with a climbing wall slide, storefront windows, a homework space with desks, a library with wallpapered shelves and a vintage sliding ladder.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael transform a neglected bungalow into a coastal retreat ideal for a weekend getaway offering the best of Galveston without ever leaving the comforts of home.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: To balance design, family and functionality, Michael and Ashley build a staircase with custom newel post, add a fireplace with an old-wood mantel, build legs for their 12-foot island and put 5-foot cast iron kitchen sinks in their primary bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: The Cordray family has been in Galveston for over a century, and for 50 years they ran a corner drug store; Ashley wants to bring it back; with a baby due in a few weeks, Michael doesn't think it's a good time to open a new business.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley turn a dilapidated wood mill from 1908 into a wedding venue complete with limestone-like stamped concrete, a wedding arbor, lathe table bar, a grand staircase and two dressing suites.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team honors grandfather Bampy Hersom's memory by continuing renovations on his cabin and creating a bigger bathroom and kitchen.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: Tree Damage to Lakeside Dream Cabin
programme.desc: The Maine Cabin Masters team faces a challenging cabin restoration after a massive tree damage to a Maine camp; they'll raise ceilings, move the kitchen for lake views, rework the staircase and remove rooms for rustic charm.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Converting the first post office ever built in Manchester, Maine, into an off-the-grid cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Hamill family hope that Chase and the Cabin Masters can improve the livability of their rustic 1963 Mount Vernon cabin, which has no kitchen, bathroom or electricity.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Maine Cabin Masters take on another Cobbosseecontee camp; Homeowner Walter White and his family dream of a new deck, a natural wood exterior, and an open layout to connect his porch and living room.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Converting the first post office ever built in Manchester, Maine, into an off-the-grid cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Hamill family hope that Chase and the Cabin Masters can improve the livability of their rustic 1963 Mount Vernon cabin, which has no kitchen, bathroom or electricity.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Maine Cabin Masters take on another Cobbosseecontee camp; Homeowner Walter White and his family dream of a new deck, a natural wood exterior, and an open layout to connect his porch and living room.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: Tree Damage to Lakeside Dream Cabin
programme.desc: The Maine Cabin Masters team faces a challenging cabin restoration after a massive tree damage to a Maine camp; they'll raise ceilings, move the kitchen for lake views, rework the staircase and remove rooms for rustic charm.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his designer Karen Tillery take steps to realize his dream of building a small village of finished antique structures in White Sulphur Springs, West Virginia.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Carthage, Maine where they save a barn from the 1840s; as they uncover the craftsmanship of the old New England style barn, they have fun kayaking, canoeing, searching for crawdads and even enjoying some lobster rolls.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The guys head to West Sunbury, Penn to restore a complex log cabin; it consists of more than 150 parts that must fit together perfectly; Mark looks for the next job, finding one of the best built barns he's ever seen.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna takes on Southern cooking as she makes crispy fried chicken, garlic mashed potatoes, fresh coleslaw and creamy strawberry pie topped with whipped cream.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna prepares a raspberry chipotle pork tenderloin.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna celebrates her love for Italian food by preparing her favorite dishes for a lunch date with Chip, including crispy, warm arancini with homemade marinara sauce, chicken Florentine over pasta and sweet ice cream for dessert.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna elevates a simple, healthy salmon dinner with fresh and flavorful ingredients, complete with a butternut squash spinach salad, light lemon orzo and a smooth panna cotta topped with spiced pear.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Weekend Warriors in the Outer Banks
programme.desc: A couple looks for a family beach getaway in the Outer Banks along the shores of Avon, N.C.; the family of do-it-yourselfers tackles the home's major projects and repurpose as much as they can to keep renovation costs down.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Forever Home in Isle of Palms
programme.desc: A woman is looking for a home in Isle of Palms, S.C., that is close to the beach and has enough space for family and friends; she finds a home that could be perfect, but it needs a lot of work, so she sets out to turn her dream into a reality.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Maryland couple searches for a beachfront property in Hampton, Va., where they can make seaside memories with their daughters; she looks for ways to cut costs on the renovation without sacrificing style.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: An Unforgettable Renovation on Florida's Forgotten Coast
programme.desc: Despite being engaged with a wedding to plan, Anne and DJ have decided to add more to their plate by purchasing a beach home on the so-called Forgotten Coast of Florida; Anne and DJ plan to take on the majority of the renovation work themselves.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Major Renovation in Gulf Shores
programme.desc: When renovations are halted on a local property in Gulf Shores, Alabama, a couple seeks to transform it into a welcoming home that serves as a getaway for vacationing women.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: NFL players reach out to Chip and Joanna to help renovate the home for a veteran to make it more accessible for him.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Jo add a fresh, functional design to a dated ranch home in Waco.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: After being away from Waco, Texas, for six years, Will and Lauren return to raise their two daughters in the house of their dreams.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Jo meet with a client who just purchased a 1950s bungalow hoping to make it her forever home after losing her husband to cancer.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: After experiencing a devastating tornado, a family wants to build an off-grid retreat overlooking Tennessee's Ocoee River; as amateur builders, they must rely on the help of friends and family, and each other, to reach the finish line.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliff-side retreat for a family in the Sierra Nevada Mountains; for Gregg and his team, erecting this house in the middle of nowhere comes with its share of challenges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: From the edge of an active volcano in Hawaii and the Appalachian Mountains to the deserts of New Mexico and upstate New York, builders battle harsh conditions to construct innovative, self-sufficient homes in remote areas.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast works to build his dream retirement home in the Idaho mountains, but weather and material shortages slow his timeline.
